title: Industrial Decorations
description: A mod adding some industrial-themed decorations (and a bit of uranium)
body:
This mod adds a bunch of industrial-themed decorations, and also unintentionally ended up having heavy emphasis on uranium.

I'm not great at blockstates yet so you do need a Pipe Wrench to actually make the pipes connect

Please do not drink the radioactive goop.


---------------------------------
If you want to see more mod projects like this, Check out my Twitch, where I make mods suggested by chat: [https://www.twitch.tv/modman337](https://www.twitch.tv/modman337)

You can also suggest things and report bugs on my discord: [https://discord.gg/MwjqnG3UqD](https://discord.gg/MwjqnG3UqD)
